name: RecentSessionsList error secondary action pushes deeper into child stack
description: [FCR 2026-06-21 · L6-12] parent-viewing-child error secondary pushes deeper into the curriculum stack instead of a clean back/home escape. Fix: offer back/home.
acceptanceCriteria: Root cause: for non-active child profiles, RecentSessionsList builds errorEscapeAction from emptyAction, so the error secondary action pushes to the child curriculum stack instead of giving an escape route. Variants: active-profile error should go home; parent-viewing-child error should back/home rather than push deeper. Regression test: extend apps/mobile/src/components/progress/RecentSessionsList.test.tsx to cover both error secondary-action variants.
